_meta.description: DuitNow QR cross-border payment linkages — corridors, participating banks, and technical details

phases.scope: Thai users scan DuitNow QR at Malaysian merchants
Malaysian users scan Thai QR (PromptPay) at Thai merchants
Cross-border QR payments — scan NETS QR (SG) and DuitNow QR (MY)
PayNow-DuitNow real-time fund transfer linkage (P2P via mobile number)

corridors.notes: PayNow-DuitNow is world's first real-time payment linkage with non-bank participation

phases.scope: Inbound — Chinese tourists scan DuitNow QR in Malaysia via Alipay/WeChat Pay
Outbound — Malaysians scan Alipay+ QR at supported merchants globally

corridors.notes: Via Ant Group partnership; also supports tourists from 7+ countries using Alipay+ wallets (GCash, KakaoPay, etc.)

phases.scope: Agreement signed — Phase 1: Indian tourists scan DuitNow QR in Malaysia via UPI apps
Planned — Malaysians scan UPI QR in India

corridors.notes: Timed for Visit Malaysia 2026; 2.9 million DuitNow QR merchants ready

inbound.description: Malaysian banks/wallets that accept cross-border QR payments from foreign tourists at DuitNow QR merchants

outbound.description: Malaysian banks/wallets that allow Malaysians to scan foreign QR codes when travelling
outbound.notes: List is growing; check your bank app for latest supported corridors

transactionLimits.fxRate: Provided by PayNet at point of transaction

technicalNotes.qrStandard: EMVCo QR Code Specification for Payment Systems (EMV QRCPS)
technicalNotes.emvTag: Tag 26-51 (Merchant Account Information) carries cross-border routing data
technicalNotes.settlementModel: Settlement banks in each corridor handle FX conversion and clearing
technicalNotes.authentication: Follows domestic app authentication (biometric / PIN / AppAuthorise)
technicalNotes.refunds: Must be requested from the foreign merchant; refund amount may differ due to FX fluctuation

projectNexus.description: BIS Innovation Hub initiative — hub-and-spoke model replacing bilateral links
projectNexus.benefit: Connect once to Nexus, access all participating countries

futureRoadmap.aseanTarget: Fully integrated ASEAN QR payment zone by 2030
